LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN BUSINESS FORMS & SYSTEMS INC.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-04-432167 WITH CASE #432435 IS GRANTED. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-04-432167 WITH CASE CGC-04-432435
Off Calendar Jul-20-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joseph M. Patane, Esq. (415) 563-7200 for Plaintiff and Moving Party O'Brien Business Forms & Systems Inc.
Gianna Gruenwald, Esq., Saveri & Saveri, Inc. (415) 217-6810 for Plaintiffs Harman Press (#432167) and Bookman Press (#432416)
Stuart C. Plunkett, Esq., Morrison & Foerster LLP (415) 268-6145 for Defendant and Joinder Norske Skog Canada (USA) Inc.
Joel S. Sanders, Esq., Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher LLP (415) 393-8268 for Defendant International Paper Co.
Lisa Kimmel, Esq., Howrey Simon Arnold & White LLP (415) 848-4900 for Defendant Meadwestvaco Corp.
RULING:
THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: PLAINTIFF O'BRIEN BUSINESS FORMS & SYSTEMS INC.'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-04-432167 WITH CASE #432435 is GRANTED. The Court's ruling also includes the consolidation of #432416 with #432435 and #432167. All future filings shall be in #432167. The motion to consolidate set for 07/26/04 is vacated. Order signed. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Mtn To Consolidate Cases

RULING:
THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS MODIFIED: DEFENDANT NORSKE SKOG CANADA (USA) INC.'S Joinder In Plaintiff's Motion To Consolidate Cases #432435 and #432167: GRANTED. The Court's ruling also includes the consolidation of #432416 with #432435 and #432167. All future filings shall be in #432167. The motion to consolidate set for 07/26/04 is vacated. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
